project_type: React + Vite single-page application (visual workspace/mind-mapping tool)
test_command: npm run build (no test suite - use build as validation)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to ensure deps resolve. 2. Run npm run build to verify no compilation errors. 3. Optionally run npm run dev to check the app loads.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access, can install packages freely
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: All localStorage operations are in App.jsx. Data is stored under keys: 'nexus-app-state' (array of project objects), 'nexus-active-project' (string ID), 'nexus-default-project' (string ID). Auto-save uses a 500ms debounce timer (saveTimerRef) in a useEffect that watches [workspaces, activeTab, nextId, reminders, tasks, taskGroups, initialized, activeProjectId]. Each project object contains: id, name, password, description, thumbnail, lastModified, workspaces (array of {id, name, groups, nodes, edges, images, pins}), activeTab, nextId, reminders, tasks, taskGroups. The switchProject and cycleToProject functions handle loading different projects.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx (main component, 5982 lines, all persistence logic)
directory_structure: Flat src/ directory with App.jsx (main), CardEditorPanel.jsx, FullTaskManager.jsx, MiniMap.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, MarkdownRenderer.jsx, taskConstants.js, index.css, main.jsx. Public assets in public/. Config files at root.
